ddls:
CREATE TABLE "submittals" (
  "submittal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submittal */,
  "jmf_id" TEXT /* JMF ID of the submittal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submittal (e.g., Submittal Completeness in Review, Submittal Accepted for Verification) */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the submittal */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the entity or user who created the submittal */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the submittal was created */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to view the submittal */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the submittal is associated with */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the submittal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the submittal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the submittal was updated */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to review the submittal */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the submittal was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the submittal is not approved */,
  "status_history" TEXT /* JSON array of status changes for detailed tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submittal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittals_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittals_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittals_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittals_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, Submittal Reviewer, Admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the project details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submittal_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action in the history */,
  "submittal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submittal the action was taken on */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Created, Reviewed, Approved) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "actioned_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittal_history_submittal_id FOREIGN KEY ("submittal_id") REFERENCES submittals ("submittal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submittal_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "submittal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submittal the document is attached to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, Image) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submittal_documents_submittal_id FOREIGN KEY ("submittal_id") REFERENCES submittals ("submittal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "submittal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submittal the notification is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is sent to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Submittal Submitted, Submittal Reviewed) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Read) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_submittal_id FOREIGN KEY ("submittal_id") REFERENCES submittals ("submittal_id")
)
